nasb.text: So the sons of Israel came to buy grain among those who were coming, for the famine was in the land of Canaan also.

esv.text: Thus the sons of Israel came to buy among the others who came, for the famine was in the land of Canaan.

cnv.text: 以色列的眾子也在前來買糧的人群中，因為迦南地也有饑荒。

ccb.text: 以色列的儿子们加入了买粮的行列，因为迦南也闹饥荒。

csbs.text: 这样，以色列的儿子们夹杂在前来的人群中也来买粮，因为迦南地也有饥荒。
